fundamentals.name: ProShares Ultra VIX Short-Term Futures ETF
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The index seeks to offer exposure to market volatility through publicly traded futures markets and is designed to measure the implied volatility of the S&P 500 over 30 days in the future.

news.paragraph: UVXY is a leveraged ETF designed to track volatility, often used as a hedging tool or a speculative play on market uncertainty. Recent articles highlight its role as a put option surrogate for S&P 500 bears and a hedging instrument for uncertain times, suggesting its utility is tied to periods of market stress. However, one article warns that "good things do not last," implying the leveraged nature of UVXY can lead to significant decay and risk over time, especially in stable or rising markets.
